content:
Hi @Sami Tolvanen, welcome to the team :)

Hopefully you have clearer picture of where we are at, given the overview we discussed during the last call, but if not, feel free to ping me.

Please let me know if you need any help with setting up your RockPi 5. I suggest that you use the same TFTP+NFS setup we are using. I have instructions that Alice used to setup her environment correctly that I will share with you through email.

Just as a reminder, here is our issue board: https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/panfrost/linux/-/issues/?label_name%5B%5D=tyr

I've assigned these three to you, as I think they are a good way to get to know the project:

panfrost/linux#46 is the easiest. That's just some copy-and-pasting and it is a great task to test your setup with.

panfrost/linux#42 is a bit intermediate, but still doable. You will need to write your own IGT test to ensure it works. This will also get you started with IGT, which is a pretty core component in our workflow.

panfrost/linux#45 is slightly harder, I advise leaving this one last.

Feel free to call me whenever you need any help. I've reserved chunks of my time to help with the ramp-up. You can simply find a free slot in my calendar and send me an invite :)
Thanks, Daniel! I'll definitely take you up on that offer once I have time to start looking into Tyr a bit more. I'm hoping to get a dev board this week, so setup instructions would be great!
